Terms & Conditions

Introduction

These Terms & Conditions define the rules and responsibilities of users and the platform. Legal references to applicable constitutional and regulatory requirements are considered where relevant.

Content Ownership

All content is owned by the platform or licensors. User contributions grant the platform a license for lawful use and sharing.

Termination of Access

Violations may lead to temporary or permanent suspension of accounts. Legal consequences may apply depending on the severity of misconduct.

Governing Law & Jurisdiction

These terms are governed by national and constitutional laws. Legal disputes will be resolved in the appropriate courts.
